detail.description: Jhonny Pereda singles on a ground ball to center fielder A.J. Ewing.
Jhonny Pereda homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Cole Young scores. Dominic Canzone scores.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a line drive to center fielder A.J. Ewing. Patrick Wisdom to 2nd.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a line drive to left fielder Tim Tawa.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt.

Jhonny Pereda singles on a fly ball to center fielder Mauricio Dubón.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Michael Harris II.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a ground ball to shortstop Zack Short, deflected by third baseman Kevin McGonigle.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a line drive to right fielder Wenceel Pérez.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a ground ball to right fielder Leody Taveras. Miles Mastrobuoni to 2nd.
Jhonny Pereda singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Colton Cowser. Dominic Canzone to 3rd.
